spec.description: Top-level health view. Service-health stats use Loki log volume over the dashboard time range as a liveness proxy (CloudWatch-based ECS metrics are deferred until cluster naming is standardized). Narrow the time picker to ~5m for strict liveness; widen to surface bursty local-dev activity. Each service stat drills into the per-service dashboard; each indexing stat drills into the Indexing dashboard.

panels.description: Realm-server HTTP throughput and error rate. Lines from httpLogging exit (`--> METHOD ACCEPT URL: STATUS`) for total request rate; lines matching `error|exception|fatal` for error rate. Legend shows the mean over the visible time range.
panels.title: Web Requests

panels.description: Worker job throughput and failures, bucketed at 1 minute. Resolved jobs (`status='resolved'`) and rejected jobs (`status='rejected'`) stacked. Legend shows the mean over the visible time range. Counts ALL job types, not just indexing — for indexing-only throughput see the Indexing dashboard.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(finished_at, '1m'),
       COUNT(*) AS "Jobs/min"
  FROM jobs
 WHERE status = 'resolved'
   AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
   AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
 GROUP BY 1
 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(finished_at, '1m'),
       COUNT(*) AS "Failures/min"
  FROM jobs
 WHERE status = 'rejected'
   AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
   AND $__timeFilter(finished_at)
 GROUP BY 1
 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Job Queue

panels.description: Synapse send-event rate — `PUT /_matrix/client/.../send/<event-type>/<txnId>` requests parsed from synapse access logs. Counts ALL Matrix event types (`m.room.message` for chat, `app.boxel.realm-event` for boxel realm sync, etc.) since boxel uses Matrix as its event bus, not just for chat. Legend shows the mean over the visible time range.
panels.title: Synapse

panels.description: ECS resource utilisation for `boxel-realm-server-${env}` on cluster `${env}`. CPU and memory are average over the panel refresh window; Tasks is the latest RunningTaskCount. Locally these show 'No data' — CloudWatch is staging/production only.
panels.title: Realm Server

panels.description: ECS resource utilisation for `boxel-prerender-server-${env}` on cluster `${env}`. CPU and memory are average over the panel refresh window; Tasks is the latest RunningTaskCount. Locally these show 'No data' — CloudWatch is staging/production only.
panels.title: Prerender

panels.description: ECS resource utilisation for `boxel-prerender-manager-${env}` on cluster `${env}`. CPU and memory are average over the panel refresh window; Tasks is the latest RunningTaskCount. Locally these show 'No data' — CloudWatch is staging/production only.
panels.title: Prerender Mgr

panels.description: ECS resource utilisation for `boxel-worker-${env}` on cluster `${env}`. CPU and memory are average over the panel refresh window; Tasks is the latest RunningTaskCount. Locally these show 'No data' — CloudWatch is staging/production only.
panels.title: Worker

panels.description: ECS resource utilisation for `synapse-${env}` on cluster `${env}`. CPU and memory are average over the panel refresh window; Tasks is the latest RunningTaskCount. Locally these show 'No data' — CloudWatch is staging/production only.
panels.title: Synapse

panels.description: Boxel application database transaction rate (xact_commit + xact_rollback) averaged since the postmaster started. Not a rolling window — recent spikes will be smoothed. Drill into the DB-specific dashboard for detail.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 60.0 * (xact_commit + xact_rollback) / NULLIF(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - pg_postmaster_start_time())), 0) AS "txn/min" FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = 'boxel';

panels.title: Postgres DB

panels.description: All firing and pending Grafana alert rules. Drill into a rule for details and silences. Replaces the Worker Status alertlist (which was a single-panel dashboard).
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Indexing jobs (from-scratch-index, incremental-index, full-reindex) waiting on a worker. Click to open Indexing dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW() WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex') AND jr.id IS NULL;

panels.title: Pending Indexing Jobs

panels.description: Indexing jobs currently being processed by a worker.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS in_flight FROM jobs j JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW() WHERE j.finished_at IS NULL AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex');

panels.title: In-flight

panels.description: Age of the oldest pending indexing job. Yellow at 1 minute, red at 5 minutes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(j.created_at))) AS oldest_pending_seconds FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW() WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex') AND jr.id IS NULL;

panels.title: Oldest Pending

panels.description: Files in boxel_index whose latest index attempt failed (across all realms).

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS errors FROM boxel_index WHERE type = 'error' AND is_deleted IS NOT TRUE;

panels.title: Indexing Errors

panels.description: Indexing throughput across all realms in the dashboard time window. Drills into the Indexing dashboard.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(j.created_at, '30s'), COUNT(*) AS arrived FROM jobs j WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex') AND $__timeFilter(j.created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(jr.created_at, '30s'), COUNT(*) AS started FROM job_reservations jr JOIN jobs j ON j.id = jr.job_id WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex') AND $__timeFilter(jr.created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(j.finished_at, '30s'), COUNT(*) AS completed FROM jobs j WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex') AND j.finished_at IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(j.finished_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Indexing throughput

options.content:
### Other dashboards

- **Entity dashboards** — pick a specific entity to inspect:
  - [Realms](/d/boxelrealms001) — counts, permissions, indexing status, recent errors
  - [Users](/d/boxelusers0001) — credits, realm permissions, grant access
- **Workflow dashboards**:
  - [Indexing](/d/aetquzjcf2znke) — pipeline metrics + operator actions
  - [Job Queue](/d/boxeljobqueue1) — generic worker queue (all job types)
- **Forensics**: [Logs](/d/fetquzizsej28b) — filter by service, user, realm
- **Service deep-dives** (stub — currently filtered logs only): [Realm Server](/d/boxel-svc-realm-server) · [Prerender Server](/d/boxel-svc-prerender-server) · [Prerender Manager](/d/boxel-svc-prerender-manager) · [Worker](/d/boxel-svc-worker) · [Synapse](/d/000000012)

spec.title: Overview
